3	 * MCP Task Server — exposes SQLite task management as MCP tools.
4	 * Env: CHODA_DATA_DIR — data root (database/, artifacts/, backups/ derived)

6	 *      CHODA_CONTENT_ROOT — required for file reads
7	 */

9	import { McpServer } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js'
10	import { StdioServerTransport } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js'
11	import { SqliteTaskService } from '../../core/domain/sqlite-task-service'
12	import { resolveDataPaths } from '../../core/paths'
13	import * as taskTools from './mcp-tools/task-tools'
14	import * as phaseTools from './mcp-tools/phase-tools'
15	import * as roadmapTool from './mcp-tools/roadmap-tool'
16	import * as searchTool from './mcp-tools/search-tool'
17	import * as conversationTools from './mcp-tools/conversation-tools'
18	import * as projectTools from './mcp-tools/project-tools'
19	import * as sessionTools from './mcp-tools/session-tools'
20	import * as inboxTools from './mcp-tools/inbox-tools'
21	import * as backupTools from './mcp-tools/backup-tools'
22	
23	const { dbPath, dataDir } = resolveDataPaths()
24	
25	async function main(): Promise<void> {
26	  const svc = new SqliteTaskService(dbPath)
27	
28	  const server = new McpServer(
29	    { name: 'choda-tasks', version: '0.2.0' },
30	    { capabilities: { tools: {} } }
31	  )
32	
33	  taskTools.register(server, svc)
34	  phaseTools.register(server, svc)
35	  roadmapTool.register(server, svc)
36	  searchTool.register(server, svc)
37	  conversationTools.register(server, svc)
38	  projectTools.register(server, svc)
39	  sessionTools.register(server, svc)
40	  inboxTools.register(server, svc)
41	  backupTools.register(server, svc, dataDir, dbPath)
42	
43	  const transport = new StdioServerTransport()
44	  await server.connect(transport)
45	}
46	
47	main().catch((err) => {
48	  console.error('MCP Task Server failed:', err)
49	  process.exit(1)
50	})

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env node
/**
 * MCP Task Server — exposes SQLite task management as MCP tools.
 * Env: CHODA_DATA_DIR — data root (database/, artifacts/, backups/ derived)
 *      CHODA_DB_PATH  — legacy override for DB path only
 *      CHODA_CONTENT_ROOT — required for file reads
 */

import { McpServer } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/mcp.js'
import { StdioServerTransport } from '@modelcontextprotocol/sdk/server/stdio.js'
import { SqliteTaskService } from '../../core/domain/sqlite-task-service'
import { resolveDataPaths } from '../../core/paths'
import * as taskTools from './mcp-tools/task-tools'
import * as phaseTools from './mcp-tools/phase-tools'
import * as roadmapTool from './mcp-tools/roadmap-tool'
import * as searchTool from './mcp-tools/search-tool'
import * as conversationTools from './mcp-tools/conversation-tools'
import * as projectTools from './mcp-tools/project-tools'
import * as sessionTools from './mcp-tools/session-tools'
import * as inboxTools from './mcp-tools/inbox-tools'
import * as backupTools from './mcp-tools/backup-tools'

const { dbPath, dataDir } = resolveDataPaths()

async function main(): Promise<void> {
  const svc = new SqliteTaskService(dbPath)

  const server = new McpServer(
    { name: 'choda-tasks', version: '0.2.0' },
    { capabilities: { tools: {} } }
  )

  taskTools.register(server, svc)
  phaseTools.register(server, svc)
  roadmapTool.register(server, svc)
  searchTool.register(server, svc)
  conversationTools.register(server, svc)
  projectTools.register(server, svc)
  sessionTools.register(server, svc)
  inboxTools.register(server, svc)
  backupTools.register(server, svc, dataDir, dbPath)

  const transport = new StdioServerTransport()
  await server.connect(transport)
}

main().catch((err) => {
  console.error('MCP Task Server failed:', err)
  process.exit(1)
})

content.text: Đây là entry point của MCP server `choda-tasks`: nó khởi tạo `SqliteTaskService` từ đường dẫn DB (qua `resolveDataPaths()`) rồi đăng ký toàn bộ tool handler (task, phase, roadmap, search, conversation, project, session, inbox, backup) lên một `McpServer`. Sau đó kết nối server qua `StdioServerTransport` để Claude Code giao tiếp qua stdio.

Sau đó kết nối server qua `StdioServerTransport` để Claude Code giao tiếp qua stdio.
